burgers.name: Hamburger
burgers.description: Single beef patty with lettuce, tomato, onion, spread, and your choice of extras.

burgers.name: Cheeseburger
burgers.description: Single beef patty with a slice of American cheese and all the standard toppings.

burgers.name: Double-Double
burgers.description: Two beef patties and two slices of American cheese — the In-N-Out signature item.

burgers.name: 3x3
burgers.description: Three beef patties with three slices of cheese. Not on the menu board — just ask.

burgers.name: 4x4
burgers.description: Four beef patties with four slices of cheese. Still totally doable.

burgers.name: Grilled Cheese
burgers.description: Two slices of melted American cheese on a toasted bun — no meat. Great vegetarian option.

burgers.name: Flying Dutchman
burgers.description: Two beef patties with two slices of melted cheese — no bun, no toppings. Pure protein.

burgers.name: Wish Burger
burgers.description: All the veggie toppings on a bun — no meat, no cheese. Lighter than it sounds.

burgers.name: Pup Patty
burgers.description: A plain, unseasoned beef patty for your dog. Served separately.

burgerModifiers.name: Animal Style
burgerModifiers.description: Mustard-fried patty + grilled onions + extra spread + extra pickles.

burgerModifiers.name: Protein Style
burgerModifiers.description: Lettuce wrap replaces the bun. Low carb and surprisingly good.

burgerModifiers.name: Mustard Grilled
burgerModifiers.description: Mustard seared directly onto the patty while it cooks — adds a tangy char.

burgerModifiers.name: Double Meat
burgerModifiers.description: An extra beef patty without extra cheese.

burgerModifiers.name: Grilled Onions
burgerModifiers.description: Slow-caramelized onions instead of raw. Much sweeter and softer.

burgerModifiers.name: Extra Cheese
burgerModifiers.description: An extra slice of American cheese.

burgerModifiers.name: Chilies
burgerModifiers.description: Diced mild yellow or green chiles added to your burger.

burgerModifiers.name: Extra Spread
burgerModifiers.description: Extra of In-N-Out's Thousand Island-style secret sauce.

burgerModifiers.name: Spread on the Side
burgerModifiers.description: Spread served in a cup, not on the bun — good for dipping.

burgerModifiers.name: No Spread
burgerModifiers.description: No spread on bun or patty.

fries.name: Regular Fries
fries.description: Freshly cut Kennebec potatoes fried to order. You can customize how done you want them.

friesDoneness.name: Very Light
friesDoneness.description: Barely cooked — pale, soft, almost like a potato stick.

friesDoneness.name: Light
friesDoneness.description: Lighter color and softer texture than standard.

friesDoneness.name: Slightly Light
friesDoneness.description: Just a hair under the standard cook.

friesDoneness.name: Regular
friesDoneness.description: Standard In-N-Out fry — the default. Golden and a bit soft.

friesDoneness.name: Light-Well
friesDoneness.description: Slightly crisper than regular, not quite well-done.

friesDoneness.name: Well-Done
friesDoneness.description: Extra crispy and golden all the way through. Highly recommended.

friesDoneness.name: Extra Well-Done
friesDoneness.description: Maximally crispy — almost crunchy. Gets close to a chip.

friesAddOns.name: Animal Style
friesAddOns.description: Topped with melted cheese, grilled onions, and special spread.

friesAddOns.name: Cheese
friesAddOns.description: Melted American cheese poured over your fries.

friesAddOns.name: Roadkill
friesAddOns.description: Animal Style fries with a Flying Dutchman burger crumbled right on top.

drinks.name: Barq's Root Beer
drinks.description: Fountain Barq's Root Beer. The one with bite.

drinks.name: Pink Lemonade
drinks.description: Fresh lemonade with strawberry. A newer addition.

drinks.name: Arnold Palmer
drinks.description: Half iced tea, half lemonade — a classic combo.

drinks.name: Lemon-Up
drinks.description: 7UP with lemon — a secret off-menu mix.

drinks.name: Root Beer Float
drinks.description: Barq's Root Beer with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

shakes.name: Vanilla
shakes.description: Classic vanilla milkshake made with real ice cream.

shakes.name: Neapolitan
shakes.description: Vanilla, chocolate, and strawberry layered in one cup.

shakes.name: Around the World
shakes.description: All three flavors fully blended — everything at once.
